[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000 2
1 1011110 5
2 1101111 6
3 1011110 5
4 1111111 a
5 1011101 5
6 0111101 5
7 1111111 a

01 10 1001110 4
12 21 1001000 2
23 32 0010000 1
34 43 0010000 1
45 54 0001101 3
56 65 0001101 3
67 76 0110000 2 match 0
70 07 0010000 1

02 20 1011000 3
13 31 0100000 1
24 42 0011000 2
35 53 0000000 a
46 64 0011101 4
57 75 0000000 a
60 06 1011110 5 match 1 3
71 17 0100000 1

03 30 0010000 1
14 41 0001101 3
25 52 0001000 1
36 63 0110000 2 match 0
47 74 0010000 1
50 05 0001100 2
61 16 1101111 6 match 2
72 27 0010000 1

15 51 0001101 3
26 62 1011000 3
37 73 0110000 2 match 0
